string.text:
The MCX series, developed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, is available in both civilian semi-automatic and fully automatic variants. It features a short-stroke gas piston system inherited from the earlier SIG MPX submachine gun.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Optics: %c[0,250,250,0] All Weaver/Picatinny mounts
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Suppressor: %c[d_orange] AAC "7.62 SDN-6"

The MCX series, developed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, is available in both civilian semi-automatic and fully automatic variants. It features a short-stroke gas piston system inherited from the earlier SIG MPX submachine gun.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Optics: %c[0,250,250,0] All Weaver/Picatinny mounts
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Tactical Grip: %c[d_blue] Zenith RK-5
 %c[d_purple] • %c[d_green] Suppressor: %c[d_orange] KAC "PRS/QDC"
